title: Nike Energy Marketing Specialist Berlin (all genders) — maternity leave cover
required_skills: In-depth understanding of youth culture, music, fashion, art and design
3+ years marketing experience with cultural ambassador management focus
Strong written and verbal communication in German and English
bonus_skills: Strong network in the fashion industry
matched_skills: German language (B2 — partial match for 'strong German' requirement)
missing_skills: Cultural ambassador network in Berlin & Germany
Youth culture expertise (music, fashion, art, design)
Fashion / art / music industry background or network
core_responsibilities: Identify, manage and maintain a network of cultural ambassadors in Berlin & Germany
Provide brand management and exceptional service to all ambassador relationships
Engage with Berlin's cultural landscape to identify key consumer insights
Feed ambassador relationships strategically into Geo & Global campaign work
Support 'energy' campaigns around limited & collaboration products and create marketing concepts for brand ambassadors
recommended_emphasis: Cross-functional and international collaboration experience (EMEA, Asia)
German language proficiency to meet bilingual communication requirement
Any exposure to consumer-facing marketing campaigns or events
